Name: Microsoft Power Automate - Post AdaptiveCard
Description: Posts a message to Microsoft Teams using Microsoft Power Automate webhook.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.HookUrl
Parameters.Label: Webhook Url
Parameters.HelpText: The specific URL created by Microsoft Power Automate using 'When a Teams webhook request is received' flow template. Copy and paste the full HTTP URL from Microsoft Power Automate.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.Title
Parameters.Label: Message title
Parameters.HelpText: The title of the message that will be posted to your Microsoft Teams channel.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.Body
Parameters.Label: Message body
Parameters.HelpText: The message body of post being added to your Microsoft Teams channel.
Parameters.DefaultValue: For more information, please see [deployment details](#{if Octopus.Web.ServerUri}#{Octopus.Web.ServerUri}#{else}#{Octopus.Web.BaseUrl}#{/if}#{Octopus.Web.DeploymentLink})!

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.TitleColor
Parameters.Label: Title Color
Parameters.HelpText: The color to use for the title of the adaptive card.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
default|Default
dark|Dark
light|Light
accent|Accent
good|Good
warning|Warning
attention|Attention

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.Timeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout in seconds
Parameters.HelpText: The maximum timeout in seconds for each request.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.RetryPosting
Parameters.Label: Retry posting message
Parameters.HelpText: Should retries be made? If this option is enabled, the step will attempt to retry the posting of message to teams up to the set retry count. Default: `False`.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.RetryCount
Parameters.Label: Retry Count
Parameters.HelpText: The maximum number of times to retry the post before allowing failure. Default 1

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.RetryDelay
Parameters.Label: Retry delay in milliseconds
Parameters.HelpText: The amount of time in milliseconds to wait between retries. Default 100

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.BodyColor
Parameters.Label: Body Color
Parameters.HelpText: The color to use for the body of the adaptive card.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
default|Default
dark|Dark
light|Light
accent|Accent
good|Good
warning|Warning
attention|Attention

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.ButtonTitle
Parameters.Label: Button Title
Parameters.HelpText: The button title of post being added to your Microsoft Teams channel.

Parameters.Name: PowerAutomatePostAdaptiveCard.ButtonUrl
Parameters.Label: Button url
Parameters.HelpText: The button url of post being added to your Microsoft Teams channel.
